meaning: n.象徵挑战的物品(如手套),挑战,抵押品,担保品vt.以...为担保,以...为赌注n.(=gauge) 标准度量,计量器vt.(=gauge) 精确计量,估计
examples: New findings suggest that Gage managed to soften these abrupt changes over time and rediscover an appropriate social manner.
Though Gage continued to live and work as before, his fellow employees observed a shift in the equilibrium of his personality.
A railway worker named Phineas Gage survived an incident during which a metal rod skewered his skull, taking a considerable amount of his neocortex with it.
Dillon Gage Metals, a precious metals dealer, is the U.S. distributor for the designer bars.
Okay, so N-Gage will let you play wirelessly over the phone networks, but so what?
